title: papaver alpinum subvar. pseudoelegans
intro: Papaver alpinum subvar. pseudoelegans, also known as Alpine Poppy, is a subspecies of the Papaver alpinum plant, characterized by its unique, elegant appearance and delicate features. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum subvar. pseudoelegans include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations often involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's dried roots and flowers, which can be used to create teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
